name: Ghost Rider
text: X is equal to the number of card types in the encounter discard pile. Sins Laid Bare — Action: Discard the top card of the encounter deck. (Limit once per round).

name: Johnny Blaze
text: Contractually Obliged — Forced Response: After the villain schemes, change to Hero form. Setup: Search your deck and discard pile for The Open Road and add it to your hand.

name: Ghost Rider
text: Reduce the cost to play this card by 1 for each different type of card in the encounter discard pile. “Why do you bother running? I am not to be escaped.”

name: Hellfire Blast
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. Hellbound (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. “This fire ain't meant to scald the flesh...” — Ghost Rider

name: Sin Eater
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme. Hellbound: Heal 1 damage for each threat removed this way. “Hell to Pay" is more than an expression...it's a law.”

name: Seek Out Sin
text: Hero Action: Discard 2 cards from the top of the encounter deck. Draw a card for each different type of card discarded this way.

name: Penance Stare
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal damage to the villain equal to the amount of threat on schemes in play. (To a maximum of 5 damage.) Hellbound: Stun and confuse the villain.

name: Otherworldly Aura
text: Hero Interrupt: When you would take damage, place that damage here instead. Then, if there is at least 4 damage here, discard this card. Hellbound Hero Interrupt: When an enemy initiates an attack against you, deal 2 damage to that enemy.

name: Guilty!
text: Attach to the villain. Response: After a player deals damage to attached character with an [[infernal]] card, that player draws a card. (Limit twice per phase.)

name: Hell Cycle
text: Restricted. Your hero gets +1 THW. Hero Resource: Exhaust Hell Cycle → generate a [wild] resource. “I ride, and Hell follows with me.”

name: Infernal Chains
text: Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Infernal Chains and spend a [wild] resource → deal 2 damage to up to X enemies, where X is the number of different card types in the encounter discard pile.

name: War In Heaven
text: Victory 0. Characters other than Ghost Rider cannot remove threat from War In Heaven. When Defeated: Summon the Fine Print obligation and place it under this card. Fine Print is always considered to be in the encounter discard pile, and cannot be removed from under this card.

name: The Open Road
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust The Open Road → Shuffle an [[infernal ]]card from your discard pile into your deck. You get +1 hand size until the end of the phase Interrupt: Exhaust The Open Road → cancel the effects of ”Contractually Obliged.”
